achievements.title: Process Wars - IIT Ropar
achievements.description: Achieved Consolation Prize at Process Wars conducted by the Indian Institute of Technology Ropar for demonstrating strong problem-solving and presentation skills in a competitive technical environment.

achievements.title: Academic Excellence Award
achievements.description: Awarded for outstanding academic performance and NPTEL course excellence, ranking among the top 25 students.

achievements.title: 300+ Coding Problems Solved
achievements.description: Solved over 300 coding problems across major competitive programming platforms including LeetCode, GeeksforGeeks, and HackerRank.

achievements.title: NPTEL Silver Medal
achievements.description: Received a Silver Medal in the NPTEL certification course "Privacy and Security in Online Social Media".
